description: nth_smallest: 1-indexed kth-element selection with off-by-one bug. The implementation accesses sorted_values[n] when it should access sorted_values[n-1]. Multiple test cases (smallest / 2nd / 3rd / largest / out-of-range) force the provider to diagnose the consistent off-by-one across n values rather than patching individual cases.
notes: expected_first_try_fail_rate is the design-time estimate; Phase 1.5.D empirical validator runs the problem against real providers N times to measure the actual rate + updates this manifest if drift is observed. The 'validated' flag starts false and flips true after Phase 1.5.D runs.
